member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Explorer.Adapters.CashFlowAccountDto
member.summary: Output DTO with cash flow account data.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Explorer.Adapters.CashFlowExplorerQuery
member.summary: Input query DTO used to retrieve cash flow explorer information.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Explorer.Adapters.CashFlowReportQuery
member.summary: Input query DTO used to retrieve cash flow related reports information.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Explorer.Adapters.ConceptAnalyticsDto
member.summary: Output DTO for a cash ledger entry with detailed financial account information.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Explorer.CashFlowConceptsReport
member.summary: Builds a cash flow report with detailed concepts.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Explorer.CashFlowExplorer
member.summary: Process cash account totals and return them filtered and with complete information.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Explorer.CashFlowExplorerEntry
member.summary: Holds a cash flow dynamic explorer entry

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Explorer.CashFlowTotalEntry
member.summary: Holds an entry for the CashFlowTotalsReport.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Explorer.CashFlowTotalsReport
member.summary: Builds a cash flow totals report according to a cash flow accounts tree.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Explorer.UseCases.CashFlowExplorerUseCases
member.summary: Use cases used to retrieve cash flow plans.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Explorer.UseCases.CashFlowReportsUseCases
member.summary: Use cases used to retrieve cash flow plans.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Explorer.UseCases.CashFlowSearchServices
member.summary: Provides services used to retrieve cash flow related data and entities.
